channel.title: rheophile.ca — dev log
channel.description: Notes on building plastron and other reactive, offline-first tools in the open.

item.title: One HTML file vs. a web application: sample intake without the IT-approval gauntlet
item.description: Web apps are easy to build; getting IT to approve them is not. A single HTML file is the free intermediate step — offline, no server, but with SQLite, Web Crypto, and a scannable QR that composes your form data into a label so transcription never has to happen.

item.title: RheoServ Waumpaum — a credit-union core in one HTML file
item.description: A sovereign, offline-first counterpart to enterprise core banking: a person-centered credit-union core in one encrypted HTML file, with CRDT multi-operator merge and waumpaum settlement between institutions. Teller, merge, and payment-provider walkthroughs with videos.

item.title: Hiding plastron links in pictures with ChaosEdgeSteg
item.description: Chaos-based edge steganography from crypt0lith, running verbatim in Pyodide cells. Hide a plastron.ca #f= link in a Twitter-safe PNG; recover it with cover + password.

item.title: Offline HRIS for a community police office
item.description: A plastron detour — CRDT SQLite in one HTML file for offline HR merge. Juárez-skinned demo; patterns intended for plastron's own offline-capable future.

item.title: 曳尾塗中 — drag your tail in the mud
item.description: Zhuangzi's tortoise story in traditional Chinese. Click any character to break it down through a decomposition tree with English glosses.
